message:
🐛 Fix HardwareHealthCard deduplication for API path node names (#560)

The same physical node can appear with different names across cluster
contexts - a short hostname (fmaas-vllm-d-wv25b-worker-h100-3-89pkb)
vs a long API/ServiceAccount path (api-fmaas-...:6443/system:serviceaccount:.../fmaas-vllm-d-wv25b-...).

Add extractHostname() function that:
- Detects API path patterns (:6443/, /system:serviceaccount:)
- Extracts the actual hostname from the path
- Falls back to worker/gpu/compute node pattern matching

Update deduplication to use canonical hostname for grouping,
preferring shorter cluster names AND shorter node names.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
